title: How A QR Code Payment Standard Can Fuel Instant Payment Adoption
excerpt: How will a QR Code payments standard fuel adoption of instant payments in the U.S.? Matera CEO and Co-Founder, Carlos Netto explains how in his latest Forbes a
body:
How will a QR Code payments standard fuel adoption of instant payments in the U.S.? Matera CEO and Co-Founder, Carlos Netto explains how in his latest Forbes article.

Read the full article on [Forbes](https://www.forbes.com/sites/forbestechcouncil/2024/05/20/how-a-qr-code-payment-standard-can-fuel-instant-payment-adoption/?sh=4de638536f44).
